diff: Operational GovOps Soter Labs may establish auxiliary accounts on other blockchains to facilitate efficient distribution of Distribution Reward and Integration Boost payments to Integrators operating on those blockchains. Operational GovOps Soter Labs may move funds from the Demand Side Buffer Multisig to auxiliary accounts as necessary to facilitate such payments. Each auxiliary account must conform to the same standards as the Demand Side Buffer Multisig, specifically:
- at least two-thirds of signers are required to execute transactions; and
- all signers are controlled by Operational GovOps Soter Labs.
description: Establishes a standalone Demand Side Buffer account for Distribution Reward and Integration Boost payments, simplifies expense recognition in the Monthly Settlement Cycle, and removes references to legacy roles from Near-Term Process documents.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling
